# The Digital Reset — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A digital products business focused on selling downloadable or online goods. The specific niche, product types, and brand identity are yet to be defined.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About The Digital Reset
A digital products business focused on selling downloadable or online goods. The specific niche, product types, and brand identity are yet to be defined.

## Services/Products
- digital products sales

## Target Audience
- Digital Nomads
- Creative Professionals
- Online Entrepreneurs

## Industry
